action.reasoning: Observation: Eval mae_60min=4.49 vs prior 4.45 baseline. Validation plateaus at val60=3.79 (epoch ~10) yet eval is much worse (4.49). Analysis: Big train/val gap suggests overfitting. Also: train.py uses TOD feature but predict.py passes zeros for TOD at test time — major distribution shift. Removing TOD entirely should help test consistency. Also there may be a stride issue: at test time we receive 6832 windows from a hidden test set; we need consistency. Let me retrain WITHOUT TOD feature (in_dim=1) to eliminate train/test mismatch, and possibly use a slightly smaller model with more regularization. Decision: Retrain with USE_TOD=0, longer with cosine schedule.
